Nova AI

Nova AI - Privacy-focused AI chat client with tool calling, vision, and web search.

Currently it serves 1 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://loak7993-code.github.io/nova-ai-fdroid/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
25 8D 52 57 73 44 FD 47 4C F3 8A B8 E0 86 4C FC B2 1B D4 64 DE AD 34 37 CD 2C 88 8A 20 83 D7 3D
